_metadata.name: L2 - BitLocker Pre-Boot Startup PIN
_metadata.cisMapping: Device Encryption: require startup PIN (pre-boot authentication)
_metadata.assignmentNote: Not applied to KioskSharedDevice — those devices need unattended boot. Not applied to StandardUser at L2 by default — pre-boot PIN is the single highest user-friction control in this repo (adds a step to every cold boot/restart) and needs explicit change-management communication before wider rollout.
_metadata.impactNote: Existing BitLocker-encrypted devices will prompt the user to set a PIN at next reboot after policy applies — this is the one control in this repo with unavoidable, visible user impact. Communicate before deploying, don't silently enable.
_metadata.rollback: Disable profile; devices stop requiring PIN at next unlock/decrypt cycle. Already-set PINs can be cleared via manage-bde or the BitLocker control panel if needed.

name: ZeroTrust-L2-BitLocker-StartupPIN
description: Requires a pre-boot PIN for BitLocker-protected OS drives, adding defense against offline/cold-boot attacks. Highest-friction control in the baseline — admin-persona pilot only until change management is in place for wider rollout.
